title: clinopodium gracile var. sachalinense
intro: Clinopodium gracile var. sachalinense, also known as Sakhalin clinopodium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to the Sakhalin Island in Russia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clinopodium gracile var. sachalinense include its ability to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
